title: Multimodal RAG for Documents, Images, Tables, Layout, and Audio · Program Brief: Rag Table Chart Retrieval
summary: A maintenance assistant extracts only PDF text, loses diagrams and table headers, cites whole pages, and presents visual evidence without text alternatives. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the table chart retrieval increment in accessible multimodal evidence retriever. Learners progress through prediction, e…
objectives: Retrieve tables and charts with title, units, headers, cells, footnotes, series, axes, source coordinates, and calculation grain.
Compare OCR-text, image embedding, region embedding, and multi-vector late-interaction retrieval by modality and target evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-multimodal-rag-4
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-multimodal-rag-4.
# Case 1655: an incident-response knowledge search.
# Operating constraint: measure retrieval and generation separately before accepting an end-to-end score.
# Changed case: double corpus size and candidate depth while preserving the latency, memory, and cost envelope.
def worked_rag_multimodal_rag_4(pages: int = 8, text_regions: int = 20, image_regions: int = 6, table_regions: int = 4, coordinates_kept: bool = True, text_alternatives: bool = True, modality_evaluated: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "corpusworked4",
        "query4dekrow",
        "tenant1655",
        "indexworked41655",
        "prompt4dekrow1655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if pages <= 0 or min(text_regions, image_regions, table_regions) < 0:
        return False, 0, "document-regions"
    if not coordinates_kept:
        return False, pages, "visual-citation"
    if not text_alternatives:
        return False, pages, "accessibility-alternative"
    if not modality_evaluated:
        return False, pages, "modality-quality"
    regions = text_regions + image_regions + table_regions
    assert regions >= pages
    return True, regions, "multimodal-evidence"

steps.title: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Table Chart Retrieval model · Theory Rag Table Chart Retrieval
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Rag Table Chart Retrieval: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory RAG engineering team handles case 1271 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to retrieve text, tables, images, layout, and audio evidence with coordinates and accessible alternatives; preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retrieve tables and charts with title, units, headers, cells, footnotes, series, axes, source coordinates, and calculation grain.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Defend the Rag Table Chart Retrieval model · Theory Rag Table Chart Retrieval.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Table Chart Retrieval model · Theory Rag Table Chart Retrieval, keep Rag Table Chart Retrieval connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Retrieve tables and charts with title, units, headers, cells, footnotes, series, axes, source coordinates, and calculation grain.

hints: For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Table Chart Retrieval model · Theory Rag Table Chart Retrieval, name the stakeholder, corpus, source, document, chunk, model, index, query, relevance, tenant, context, citation, evaluation, and transfer boundary, Rag Table Chart Retrieval precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RAG and Python Defend the Rag Table Chart Retrieval model · Theory Rag Table Chart Retrieval, trace this concrete input and predict ingestion, normalization, retrieval, filter, fusion, reranking, context, claim, citation, abstention, latency, cost, failure, and recovery evidence before reviewing it: A theory RAG engineering team handles case 1271 during an incident-response knowledge search. Build deterministic Python evidence to retrieve text, tables, images, layout, and audio evidence with coordinates and accessible alternatives; preserve source provenance, tenant authorization, deletion, freshness, citation offsets, and untrusted-data separation; then replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retrieve tables and charts with title, units, headers, cells, footnotes, series, axes, source coordinates, and calculation grain.

For RAG and Python Defend the Rag Table Chart Retrieval model · Theory Rag Table Chart Retrieval, challenge the documented misconception with changed-query, changed-corpus, relevance, retrieval, grounding, citation, adversarial, accessibility, failure, recovery, and controlled native or production-transfer evidence: Flattening a table into arbitrary text preserves row and column meaning.
